faithful_note: Sinusoid displacement field FULLY RE (underwater.ts): 10-octave seeded synthesis, phase animates at Speed*sec*(octave+1). BUT the HgcUnderwaterFreqSynth noise TEXTURE that perturbs the field is a runtime-generated GPU texture NOT recoverable from disasm, and the plugin goes BLACK headless for t>~1.0 (unbound atlas). So per-pixel ripple phase differs from FCP; algorithm+statistics match, exact field does not. Fundamental (texture unrecoverable).
